creator: xxjack12xx@gmail.com
text: That's really strange. There must be something in a dependency that's causing this. So far I've installed/upgraded 6 machines (that had audacity 2.3.0_5 previously) to 2.3.1 and still haven't been able to reproduce. All of them are running FreeBSD 12-STABLE amd64. I'm going to have to try and install a new clean machine to see if I can reproduce.
